diagrams.title: Isolated Vertex Example
diagrams.description: A graph showing isolated vertices - vertices with no connecting edges
diagrams.purpose: Understanding isolated vertices visually - all three vertices are disconnected

diagrams.title: Pendant Vertex Example
diagrams.description: A path graph P₄ showing pendant vertices at the endpoints
diagrams.purpose: Identifying pendant vertices as endpoints in a path - degree 1 each

diagrams.title: Null Graph Examples
diagrams.description: Null graphs with different numbers of vertices showing no edges
diagrams.purpose: Visualizing null graphs - all vertices isolated, no connections

diagrams.title: Tree Pendant Vertices
diagrams.description: A tree diagram showing pendant vertices as leaf nodes
diagrams.purpose: Seeing pendant vertices in trees - maximum is n-1 in star graph
